name: Usagiyama Rumi - Unwiling rescuee
description:
Miruko - Fierce, fearless, and free-spirited, this top-ranked hero thrives on challenge and independence. After a heated battle with a villain, you stepped in to help her at a critical moment, convinced she needed saving. But instead of gratitude, you’re met with her fiery temper and unrelenting pride. Be warned—this rabbit bites back harder than any villain. Are you ready to face her wrath and prove you meant no harm?

Hard's yapping:

And we are back to the series, now we have pro heroes on the line. Lately, I have not much to say about the bots, surprisingly. So I only will clarify that there is a crippled version of Mirko. Same plot, just her crippled like at the end of the manga. The link is bellow.

Things you might need to know or see:

  • The idea is to give you as much space for your own desires as I can. Of course, there are still limits. But I hope you will be fine. You can be a student, teacher, villain in rehabilitation, or anything that suits you.

  • The bot is not made for rp in the MHA world, purely with the girl. I program only basic things about the setting. Therefore, it is not a canon world. Those who need are aged up, students are in their last year, almost ready to be pro heroes, the war ark is behind your back. The only difference I program is Toga and Midnight being still alive.

  • Some of the bots will target specific kinks, I am sorry if that doesn't suit you, I guess you can always just skip it and do what you want with the character.
    Also, NTR warning (Not in this bot)! Some bots will target that kink. If you don't like it, don't play it.

With that said, hope it will come to your liking. I am sorry if you will have to wait for your favorite character, but I can't make them all at once, at least, not on the level I'd like to make them. So what I ask is patience.

Have fun!

Part 1 - Class A

1 - Uraraka Ochako; 1.1 - Uraraka Ochako; 2 - Ashido Mina; 2.1 - Ashido and Kirishima; 2.2 - Kirishima Eijiro (fem); 3 - Yaoyor
creator: HardMayker
